bitbucketResult.summary: Replaced static MCP config with dynamic generation in launch.sh. Playwright always included, Bitbucket conditionally added when env vars present. Added BITBUCKET_USERNAME/PASSWORD/URL to docker-compose.yml and .env.example.

figmaResult.changesSummary: Removed all 18 Figma references across 5 files. Replaced with browser-based visual review (Playwright MCP) and markdown design specs. All roles preserved, only tool dependency changed.

playwrightResult.dockerComposeChanges: Added playwright service before volumes section. Added playwright dependency to war-room.
playwrightResult.summary: Added Playwright MCP service (mcr.microsoft.com/playwright/mcp, port 8931, headless chromium). Added as war-room dependency. Created config/mcp-settings.json. Updated launch.sh to merge MCP config on startup. Updated Dockerfile to copy config/.
